mapper.insert: insert into projects (project_id, title, status) values (#{projectId}, #{title}, #{status})
mapper.select:
select project_id, title, status, created_at, updated_at from projects
and ( title like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or project_id like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
order by updated_at desc, created_at desc
mapper.update: update projects set status = #{status}, updated_at = current_timestamp where project_id = #{projectId}
